title: cardamine scutata subsp. fallax
intro: Cardamine scutata subsp. fallax, also known as the variable bittercress or false bittercress, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and compound leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cardamine scutata subsp. fallax include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and stems can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
